register.description: Tīmata mā te waihanga i tētahi pūkete hou.

forgotPassword.title: I wareware ahau i taku kupuhipa.
forgotPassword.description: Tāuruhia tō wāhitau īmēra, ā, ka tukuna atu e mātou he hononga tautuhi kupuhipa ki a koe.
forgotPassword.successDescription: Kua tukuna te hononga tautuhi kupuhipa ki tō wāhitau īmēra. Tirohia tō pouakaroto.

resetPassword.invalidLinkDescription: Kāore i te tika, kāore rānei i oti te hononga tautuhi kupuhipa. Tirohia anō te hononga i roto i tō īmēra.

resetPassword.errorDefault: I rahua te tautuhi anō i te kupuhipa. Tērā pea kāore te hononga i te tika, kua pau rānei.

preferences.description: Whakahaerehia ō hongere whakamōhiotanga me ngā manakohanga whakaaturanga.
preferences.emailNotificationsDesc: Whiwhi īmēra whakamōhiotanga mō ngā karere hou me ngā whakahōutanga pānuitanga.
preferences.smsNotificationsDesc: Whiwhi karere SMS mō ngā whakamōhiotanga nui.
preferences.pushNotificationsDesc: Whiwhi whakamōhiotanga pana mō ngā whakahōutanga inamata.
preferences.saveError: I puta he hapa i te wā e whakahōu ana i ngā manakohanga.
preferences.loadError: Kāore i taea te uta i ngā manakohanga.

hero.title: Pūhara Hokohoko Kararehe Ora
hero.subtitle: Ko te tūāpapa hokohoko kararehe ora tino pono. Hokona me te hoko atu i ō kau me ō hipi me te haumaru.

secure.title: Hokohoko Haumaru
secure.description: He haumaru ngā whakawhitiwhitinga katoa. Kua manatokohia ngā mōhiohio a te kaihoko me te kaihoko.

variety.title: Whānuitanga Hua
variety.description: Kau, hipi, me ētahi atu. Kimihia te kararehe e rapuhia ana e koe.

support.title: Tautoko 24/7
support.description: Kei konei tonu mātou mō āu pātai. Kei te ora tonu tā mātou raina tautoko ora.

cta.title: Tīmata Inaianei
cta.subtitle: Noho ki tō tūranga i runga i tētahi papaaho e tūtaki ai ngā mano tini o ngā kaihoko me ngā kaihoko.

footer.newsletterDescription: Kaua e mahue ngā rārangi me ngā whakatairanga hou.
footer.tagline: Ko te tūāpapa hokohoko kararehe ora tino pono o Turkey.
footer.appleLoginComingSoon: Kāore e roa ka whakahohehia te takiuru ki a Apple.

faq.title: Ngā Pātai Auau
faq.description: Ngā whakautu ki ō pātai e pātai pinepinetia ana mō tā mātou tūāpapa.
faq.noFaqs: Kāore anō kia tāpirihia he pātai.

about.title: Mō Mātou
about.subtitle: Ko te tūāpapa hokohoko kararehe ora tino pono o Turkey.

mission.title: Tā Mātou Kaupapa
mission.description: Mā te mamati i te hokohoko kararehe ora, ko tā mātou whāinga he waihanga i tētahi hononga haumaru, mārama, me te whai hua i waenganui i ngā kaihanga me ngā kaihoko.

vision.title: Tō Mātou Tirohanga
vision.description: Hei paionia i roto i te panonitanga matihiko i roto i te rāngai ahuwhenua, hei tūāpapa hoki mō te hokohoko kararehe ora o te ao.

trust.title: Whakawhirinaki
trust.description: He mea nui te māramatanga me te pono i roto i ngā whakawhitiwhitinga katoa.

quality.title: Kounga
quality.description: Te whakapai tonu kia whiwhi ai i te ratonga pai rawa atu.

innovation.title: Auahatanga
innovation.description: Te whakarerekē i te ahumahi mā te whakamahi i te hangarau.

contact.title: Whakawhitiwhiti kōrero
contact.subtitle: Tena koa whakapā mai ki a mātou mēnā he pātai āu.

form.title: Tuhituhi mai ki a mātou
form.name: Tō ingoa
form.subject: Kaupapa
form.success: Kua tukuna pai tō karere. Ka whakapā atu mātou ki a koe i te wā e taea ai.
form.error: I puta he hapa i te tukunga o te karere. Ngāna anō.

acceptance.title: 1. Te Whakaae ki ngā Ture
acceptance.content: Mā te whakamahi i tēnei paetukutuku, e whakaae ana koe ki ngā tikanga whakamahi e whai ake nei. Ki te kore koe e whakaae ki ēnei tikanga, kaua e whakamahi i te pae.

services.title: 2. Ngā Ratonga
services.content: He tūāpapa a Livestock Trading mō te hoko me te hoko atu i ngā kararehe ora. Ko ngā whakawhitiwhitinga katoa i runga i te tūāpapa he kawenga nā te kaiwhakamahi.

accounts.title: 3. Ngā Pūkete Kaiwhakamahi
accounts.content: Me whakarato koe i ngā mōhiohio tika, ā, me ngā mōhiohio hou tonu hei waihanga i tētahi pūkete. Ko tō kawenga te haumarutanga o tō pūkete.

prohibited.title: 4. Ngā Mahi Kua Rāhuitia
prohibited.content: Kāore e whakaaetia ngā pānuitanga tinihanga, ngā kōrero teka, te tinihanga me ngā mahi turekore.

liability.title: 5. Te Whakawhāititanga o te Taunahatanga
liability.content: Kāore te tūāpapa e whai kawenga tika ana mō ngā whakawhitiwhitinga i waenga i ngā kaiwhakamahi. Ka puta ngā whakawhitiwhitinga katoa i waenga i ngā rōpū.

changes.title: 6. Ngā Huringa
changes.content: Ka taea te whakarerekē i ēnei ture me ngā herenga me te kore panui. Ka whai mana tonu ngā whakarerekētanga ina whakaputaina.

collection.title: 1. Te Kohikohi Mōhiohio
collection.content: Ina waihanga koe i tētahi pūkete, ka kohia e mātou ngā mōhiohio whaiaro pēnei i tō ingoa, wāhitau īmēra, me te nama waea. Tērā pea ka kohia e mātou ngā raraunga ingoamuna e pā ana ki tō whakamahinga o te pae.

usage.title: 2. Te Whakamahinga o ngā Mōhiohio
usage.content: Ko ngā mōhiohio ka kohia e mātou ka whakamahia hei whakarato i ā mātou ratonga, hei whakahaere i tō pūkete, hei whakarite i te haumarutanga, me te tuku atu i ngā tuku whaiaro ki a koe.

sharing.title: 3. Te Tiritiri Mōhiohio
sharing.content: Kāore ōu mōhiohio whaiaro e hokona, e retihia rānei ki tētahi atu rōpū. Kāore ōu mōhiohio e tohaina engari mō ngā take ture.

security.title: 4. Haumarutanga
security.content: Kua whakatinanahia ngā tikanga haumarutanga paerewa ā-umanga hei tiaki i ō raraunga.

cookies.title: 5. Ngā Pihikete
cookies.content: Ka whakamahia e tā mātou paetukutuku ngā pihikete hei whakapai ake i te wheako kaiwhakamahi. Ka taea e koe te whakahaere i ō manakohanga pihikete i roto i ō tautuhinga pūtirotiro.

rights.title: 6. Ō Tika
rights.content: E ai ki te Ture Tiaki Raraunga Whaiaro o Turkey (KVKK), kei a koe te mana ki te uru atu, ki te whakatika, me te muku i ō raraunga whaiaro.

metadata.title: Hokohoko Kararehe - Pūhara Hokohoko Kararehe Ora
metadata.description: Ko te tūāpapa hokohoko kararehe ora tino pono o te ao. He hokohoko kararehe haumaru, he mārama hoki.

about.title: Mō Mātou
about.description: Akohia te Hokohoko Kararehe. He tūāpapa hokohoko kararehe ora pono.

contact.title: Whakawhitiwhiti kōrero
contact.description: Whakapā mai. Kei te rite te tīma tautoko kiritaki a Livestock Trading ki te āwhina i a koe.

terms.title: Ngā Ture Whakamahi
terms.description: Ngā Ture me ngā Here mō te Hokohoko Kararehe.

privacy.title: Kaupapahere Tūmataiti

products.title: Ngā Hua
products.description: Tirotirohia ngā rārangi kararehe ora. Ngā pānuitanga pono mō ngā kau, ngā hipi, me ētahi atu.

sellers.title: Ngā Kaihoko
sellers.description: Kimihia ngā kaihoko kararehe pono. Ngā kōtaha me ngā arotake a ngā kaihoko kua manatokohia.

transporters.title: ngā kaikawe
transporters.description: Kimihia ngā kamupene kawe kararehe. He kawe kararehe ora haumaru, ngaio hoki.

search.title: Rapu
search.description: Rapu i roto i ngā rārangi kararehe ora. Rapu māmā mā te whakamahi i ngā kōwhiringa tātari me te whakarōpū.

faq.title: Ngā Pātai Auau
faq.description: Ngā pātai me ngā whakautu e pā ana ki te hokohoko kararehe.
